# alirezarezvani/claude-skills

**Source:** https://github.com/alirezarezvani/claude-skills  
**Imported:** 2026-05-30  
**Why:** 337 skills across 16 domains. Best skill format reference. Selected 15 most relevant for [YOUR-AI-NAME] platform.

## Skills imported (not already covered by existing vendors)

| Skill | Domain | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `context-window-manager` | AI/Context | Monitor and manage Claude context window usage |
| `multi-vps-deploy` | DevOps | Coordinate deploys across Venzari VPS + Venzari VPS |
| `service-dependency-map` | Architecture | Map service dependencies before making changes |
| `cron-audit` | Infrastructure | Audit all cron jobs for conflicts and missing jobs |
| `container-health-matrix` | Infrastructure | Check health of all containers in one pass |
| `env-var-audit` | Security | Audit all env vars for leaks and inconsistencies |
| `log-pattern-search` | Observability | Search logs across both VPS for patterns |
| `task-breakdown-template` | Workflow | Template for breaking large tasks into subtasks |
| `api-contract-freeze` | Backend | Freeze API contracts before breaking changes |
| `memory-compaction` | Memory | Compact and summarize memory layers |
| `ssh-tunnel-test` | Infrastructure | Test all SSH tunnels in one diagnostic pass |
| `docker-image-audit` | Infrastructure | Audit Docker images for size, age, and CVEs |
| `git-branch-cleanup` | DevOps | Clean stale worktrees and task branches |
| `runbook-generator` | Documentation | Generate a runbook from a live system inspection |
| `incident-timeline` | Operations | Build a timeline for incident post-mortems |
